# LaTeX Viewer

> A free online LaTeX editor and PDF previewer for writing, importing, compiling, and reading LaTeX documents in the browser.

LaTeX Viewer helps students, researchers, engineers, and technical writers quickly preview LaTeX documents without setting up a local TeX distribution. It accepts LaTeX source or imported `.tex` files, compiles them to PDF through a server-side Tectonic workflow, and shows compiler diagnostics with source line context.

## Primary URL

- https://latex-viewer-alpha.vercel.app/

## Best For

- Editing and previewing LaTeX documents online.
- Compiling `.tex` files to PDF from a browser.
- Quickly checking equations, sections, and document formatting.
- Extracting a clean text view from LaTeX source.
- Trying an open source LaTeX preview workflow built with React, Vite, Vercel, and Tectonic.

## Key Features

- Browser-based LaTeX source editor.
- `.tex` file import.
- Server-side Tectonic PDF compilation.
- In-browser PDF preview with zoom controls.
- Clean text preview mode.
- Compiler error messages with line-focused navigation.

## Repository

- https://github.com/yesabhishek/latex-viewer
